projectDescription: The MachineLearning project predicts the incidence of kidney disease based on medical signs recorded in a dataset of more than 1,000 patients.
A project utilizes IoT technology and RFID cards to automate and streamline employee attendance tracking. By swiping their RFID cards, the system updates attendance records in real-time.

An application designed for table booking at restaurants. Simplify the reservation process, allowing users to effortlessly browse restaurant options, check table availability, and make bookings online.
A straightforward English learning app where users are given mixed words to learn and have to transform them into intelligible words in a set amount of time.
With basic features like music, random memes, NSFW content, and blackjack for up to 12 players, this is my bot that I made for my homies to enjoy some fun at night in discord.
My colleagues and I are working together to complete the HoaSen University app, which works on the similar idea as Tinder.
A straightforward illustration of the operation and principle of ransomware.
